summary: Web application with prominent speaker logo and branded slogan

existing_features.title: Move the BrandingBannerDropdown component (containing About and Privacy Policy links) to be positioned next to the logo in the top left area of the header
Reposition the login button (currently on the right side) to be directly underneath the dropdown menu in the top left area
Add small spacing between the dropdown menu and login button to ensure easy touch/click targets

new_feature_requests.summary: Enlarge speaker logo to fill available white space at top of page
Update slogan to 'Giving Everyone A Voice!' with capital G and exclamation mark
Increase the size of the speaker logo/placeholder at the top of the page to fill the available white space, making it significantly larger than its current size
Update the slogan text to 'Giving Everyone A Voice!' with a capital 'G' at the beginning and an exclamation mark at the end
Move dropdown menu (About/Privacy Policy) next to logo in top left, place login button underneath with small spacing

projectName: Enlarge logo and update slogan formatting
